ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Would you like to stop and remove Syncthing from your tablet? This frees up RAM on the tablet.
ast.target: 您是否希望停止并从您的平板电脑中移除 Syncthing？这可以释放平板电脑的内存。

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在从 Evidlo/remarkable_entware 安装 Entware...

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在通过 opkg 安装 Syncthing...

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在部署 Syncthing systemd 服务...

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在启动 Syncthing 服务...

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在停止 Syncthing 服务...

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在移除 Syncthing 服务文件...

ast.name: info
ast.source: Migrating legacy systemd units (remarkable-sync*) to eink-sync*
ast.target: 正在迁移旧版 systemd 单元（remarkable-sync*）至 eink-sync*

ast.name: info
ast.target: 旧版 systemd 单元已移除

ast.name: info
ast.target: Syncthing 已安装，推荐使用 Syncthing

ast.name: info
ast.source: No existing Syncthing identity found, generating new one
ast.target: 未找到现有 Syncthing 身份标识，正在生成新的

ast.name: info
ast.source: rsync does not run as a daemon; no restart needed
ast.target: rsync 不作为守护进程运行；无需重启

ast.name: info
ast.source: No highlight markers found in existing note, appending section
ast.target: 在现有笔记中未找到高亮标记，正在追加章节

ast.name: info
ast.source: No PDF documents found in xochitl directory
ast.target: 在 xochitl 目录中未找到 PDF 文档

ast.name: info
ast.source: No documents matched the UUID filter
ast.target: 没有文档匹配 UUID 过滤器

ast.name: info
ast.source: No metadata files found on tablet
ast.target: 在平板电脑上未找到元数据文件

ast.name: info
ast.target: 没有符合归档条件的文档

ast.name: info
ast.source: Auto-sync: tablet reachable, starting SFTP sync
ast.target: 自动同步：平板电脑可达，正在开始 SFTP 同步

ast.name: info
ast.target: 自动同步计时器已停止

ast.name: info
ast.source: Extraction timestamps reset for all sources
ast.target: 已重置所有来源的提取时间戳

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在加载 E-Ink 同步插件

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在卸载 E-Ink 同步插件

ast.name: info
ast.source: Multi-source migration: created "Default" source from existing settings
ast.target: 多来源迁移：已从现有设置创建“默认”来源

ast.name: info
ast.source: Device state migration: moved timestamps/collisions to device-state file
ast.target: 设备状态迁移：已将时间戳/冲突移至设备状态文件

ast.name: info
ast.source: xochitl restart already in progress, skipping
ast.target: xochitl 重启已在进行中，跳过操作

ast.name: info
ast.target: 正在重启平板上的 xochitl

ast.name: info
ast.source: Restarting file watchers for sync sources
ast.target: 正在为同步来源重启文件监视器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep the current folder path unchanged
ast.target: 保持当前文件夹路径不变

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: USB-only mode blocks all WiFi sync and disables auto-sync. Use this if you want to ensure no data is sent over your network.
ast.target: 仅 USB 模式会阻止所有 WiFi 同步并禁用自动同步。如果您希望确保数据不会通过网络发送，请使用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check your tablet's network settings for the WiFi IP address.
ast.target: 请在平板的网络设置中查找 WiFi IP 地址。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tablet > Settings > Help > About > Copyrights and Licenses
ast.target: 平板 > 设置 > 帮助 > 关于 > 版权和许可证

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: SFTP downloads files directly over SSH (simpler setup). Syncthing uses continuous background sync.
ast.target: SFTP 通过 SSH 直接下载文件（设置更简单）。Syncthing 使用持续的后台同步。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required for sync. Found in Syncthing web UI > Actions > Settings > API Key
ast.target: 同步所需。可在 Syncthing 网页界面 > 操作 > 设置 > API 密钥中找到

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Periodically check for and download new files from the tablet via SFTP
ast.target: 定期通过 SFTP 检查并从平板下载新文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How often to check the tablet for new files
ast.target: 检查平板新文件的频率

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically create highlight notes when new annotations sync from the tablet
ast.target: 当新的标注从平板同步过来时，自动创建高亮笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How highlight notes link back to PDF pages
ast.target: 高亮笔记如何链接回 PDF 页面

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only process documents changed since last run
ast.target: 仅处理自上次运行以来更改的文档

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also extract highlights from EPUB-format books.
ast.target: 同时从 EPUB 格式的书籍中提取高亮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace highlight notes on each extraction. When off, new highlights are merged into existing notes.
ast.target: 每次提取时替换高亮笔记。关闭时，新高亮会合并到现有笔记中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the color name (yellow, green, pink) for each highlight in the output.
ast.target: 在输出中显示每个高亮的颜色名称（黄色、绿色、粉色）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Organize highlights under page number headers. When off, highlights appear as a flat list.
ast.target: 将高亮按页码标题组织。关闭时，高亮以平面列表形式显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Connect an additional reMarkable tablet or sync folder
ast.target: 连接额外的 reMarkable 平板或同步文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the synced xochitl directory
ast.target: 已同步的 xochitl 目录路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional subfolder within highlights folder for this source's notes
ast.target: 高亮文件夹内用于此来源笔记的可选子文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check if the plugin can reach your tablet
ast.target: 检查插件是否能连接到您的平板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually run extraction on all synced documents
ast.target: 手动对所有已同步文档运行提取

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reconfigure connection, sync, and folder settings
ast.target: 重新配置连接、同步和文件夹设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Extracted highlight notes are saved here.
ast.target: 提取的高亮笔记保存在此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to template for highlight notes. Edit this file to customize the output format.
ast.target: 高亮笔记模板的路径。编辑此文件可自定义输出格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default is 22. Only change if your tablet uses a non-standard SSH port.
ast.target: 默认为 22。仅当您的平板使用非标准 SSH 端口时才需更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait for SSH connections (milliseconds). Increase if you have a slow WiFi connection.
ast.target: 等待 SSH 连接的时间（毫秒）。如果您的 WiFi 连接较慢，请增加此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Address of Syncthing's web UI on your computer.
ast.target: 您电脑上 Syncthing 网页界面的地址。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder ID shared with your tablet (usually "remarkable-xochitl")
ast.target: 与您平板共享的文件夹 ID（通常为“remarkable-xochitl”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated tags added to notes. Leave empty for no tags.
ast.target: 添加到笔记的逗号分隔标签。留空则不添加标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force the next extraction to re-process all documents across all sources.
ast.target: 强制下次提取重新处理所有来源的所有文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Move old documents off the tablet when storage gets tight
ast.target: 当存储空间紧张时，将旧文档从平板移出

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 当 /home 使用率超过此百分比时归档

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only archive documents not opened in this many days
ast.target: 仅归档在此天数内未打开的文档

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually archive old documents from the tablet
ast.target: 手动从平板归档旧文档

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show sync status in Obsidian's bottom status bar.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 底部状态栏显示同步状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable verbose logging to the developer console for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用开发者控制台的详细日志记录以进行故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A name for this source (e.g., "My rM1", "Partner's rM2")
ast.target: 此来源的名称（例如“我的 rM1”、“伴侣的 rM2”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the synced xochitl directory (relative to vault)
ast.target: 已同步的 xochitl 目录路径（相对于库）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The Syncthing shared folder ID for this tablet
ast.target: 此平板的 Syncthing 共享文件夹 ID

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Must match the folder path you set in Syncthing above.
ast.target: 必须与您在上面 Syncthing 中设置的文件夹路径匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Files from the tablet will be downloaded here via SFTP.
ast.target: 来自平板的文件将通过 SFTP 下载到此处。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How highlight notes reference pages in the source PDF.
ast.target: 高亮笔记如何引用源 PDF 中的页面。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Extract highlights from all synced documents.
ast.target: 从所有已同步文档中提取高亮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Browse all synced documents in the sidebar.
ast.target: 在侧边栏中浏览所有已同步文档。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Verify SSH connectivity to your reMarkable.
ast.target: 验证到您 reMarkable 的 SSH 连接。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 第一步：连接到您的 reMarkable

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 同步文件夹（相对于保险库）

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Pick a document to send to reMarkable...
ast.target: 选择要发送到 reMarkable 的文档...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Note: Changing the sync folder will reset the extraction timestamp. All documents in the new folder will be processed on the next extraction run.
ast.target: 注意：更改同步文件夹将重置提取时间戳。新文件夹中的所有文档将在下次提取运行时处理。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Syncthing API key is required for sync to work.
ast.target: 同步需要 Syncthing API 密钥。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Warning: Archive folder cannot be inside a Sync folder. Syncthing would re-sync archived files back to the tablet.
ast.target: 警告：归档文件夹不能位于同步文件夹内。Syncthing 会将归档文件重新同步回平板电脑。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Warning: All folders must be different paths. Overlapping folders may cause data loss.
ast.target: 警告：所有文件夹必须是不同的路径。重叠的文件夹可能导致数据丢失。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 正在建立 SSH 连接...

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 正在检测 WiFi IP 地址...

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 正在从平板电脑读取文件列表...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Could not read device model file, falling back to RAM-based detection
ast.target: 无法读取设备型号文件，回退到基于 RAM 的检测

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Syncthing installation failed, falling back to rsync
ast.target: Syncthing 安装失败，回退到 rsync

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 无法解析 /home 磁盘使用情况

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cannot start file watcher: no sync sources configured
ast.target: 无法启动文件监视器：未配置同步源

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Vault isolation: could not determine vault base path
ast.target: 保险库隔离：无法确定保险库基础路径

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: Syncthing removed from tablet.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：已从平板电脑移除 Syncthing。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: Could not reach tablet to remove Syncthing — you can remove it later.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：无法连接到平板电脑以移除 Syncthing —— 您可以稍后手动移除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: Syncthing folder paused on this computer.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：Syncthing 文件夹已在此计算机上暂停。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：Syncthing 文件夹已恢复。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: Switched to Syncthing mode.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：已切换到 Syncthing 模式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: Syncthing needs to be set up on your tablet. Opening the setup wizard.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：需要在您的平板电脑上设置 Syncthing。正在打开设置向导。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: Syncthing folder path updated.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：Syncthing 文件夹路径已更新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: Extraction state reset. Next extraction will re-process all documents.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：提取状态已重置。下次提取将重新处理所有文档。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a label for the source.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a sync folder path.
ast.target: 请输入同步文件夹路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Warning: This sync folder is already used by another source. Each source should have a unique sync folder to avoid conflicts.
ast.target: 警告：此同步文件夹已被另一个源使用。每个源应有唯一的同步文件夹以避免冲突。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步设置完成！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please verify the current step before proceeding.
ast.target: 请在继续之前验证当前步骤。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法取消归档：无效的文档 UUID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法归档：无效的文档 UUID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法删除：无效的文档 UUID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: First-time setup required. Opening the setup wizard.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：需要首次设置。正在打开设置向导。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: No sync sources configured.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：未配置同步源。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: Sync source not found.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：未找到同步源。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: No new highlights found.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：未找到新的高亮。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: No sync source configured. Run setup wizard first.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：未配置同步源。请先运行设置向导。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: No PDF or EPUB files found in your vault.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：在您的保险库中未找到 PDF 或 EPUB 文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: E-Ink Sync: No documents needed archiving.
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：没有需要归档的文档。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 电子墨水屏同步：正在测试连接...

ast.name: error
ast.source: Syncthing API key or folder ID not configured.
ast.target: Syncthing API 密钥或文件夹 ID 未配置。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Could not find /home partition. All bridge components install to /home/root/ for safety.
ast.target: 找不到 /home 分区。为安全起见，所有桥接组件将安装到 /home/root/。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Could not read root partition info (non-critical -- we do not write to root).
ast.target: 无法读取根分区信息（非关键——我们不会写入根分区）。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Could not determine exact device model. The bridge will use conservative resource limits.
ast.target: 无法确定确切的设备型号。桥接将使用保守的资源限制。

ast.name: message
ast.source: rsync is not installed on the tablet. It can be installed via Entware: opkg install rsync.
ast.target: 平板电脑上未安装 rsync。可以通过 Entware 安装：opkg install rsync。

ast.name: message
ast.source: rsync is available and the sync source path is accessible.
ast.target: rsync 可用且同步源路径可访问。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 提取所有高亮（重新处理所有内容）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 归档 reMarkable 上的旧文档

ast.name: summary
ast.source: rsync is not available on the tablet and could not be installed.
ast.target: 平板电脑上没有 rsync 且无法安装。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Rsync-over-SSH configured as the sync method. Sync will be triggered on schedule rather than running continuously. This uses minimal tablet resources (~2MB RAM per sync).
ast.target: 已配置 Rsync-over-SSH 作为同步方法。同步将按计划触发，而非持续运行。这使用最少的平板电脑资源（每次同步约 2MB 内存）。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Syncthing API not configured. Using existing local files.
ast.target: Syncthing API 未配置。使用现有本地文件。

ast.name: summary
ast.target: Syncthing 重新扫描已成功触发。

ast.name: summary
ast.source: Could not reach Syncthing. Using existing local files.
ast.target: 无法连接到 Syncthing。使用现有本地文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No sync sources configured. Add one to start extracting highlights.
ast.target: 未配置同步源。请添加一个以开始提取高亮。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Connect your tablet via USB and enter the root password. Find the password on your tablet at Settings > Help > Copyrights and licenses (scroll to the bottom). After connecting, the plugin will auto-detect your tablet's WiFi IP for wireless syncing.
ast.target: 通过 USB 连接您的平板电脑并输入 root 密码。您可以在平板电脑的 设置 > 帮助 > 版权和许可证（滚动到底部）找到密码。连接后，插件将自动检测您平板电脑的 WiFi IP 以进行无线同步。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Plug in your reMarkable via USB cable, then enter the root password below.
ast.target: 通过 USB 线连接您的 reMarkable，然后在下方输入 root 密码。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No device information available. Please complete Step 1 first.
ast.target: 没有可用的设备信息。请先完成步骤 1。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Your reMarkable has been detected. Review the device information below.
ast.target: 已检测到您的 reMarkable。请查看下方的设备信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Syncthing provides automatic background sync between your reMarkable and this computer. It requires installing Entware and Syncthing on the tablet. All files go to /home/root/.entware (safe, reversible with rm -rf /home/root/.entware).
ast.target: Syncthing 提供您的 reMarkable 和此计算机之间的自动后台同步。它需要在平板电脑上安装 Entware 和 Syncthing。所有文件都存储在 /home/root/.entware（安全，可通过 rm -rf /home/root/.entware 撤销）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Syncthing installed on both this computer and the tablet. Internet access on the tablet for initial install.
ast.target: 在此计算机和平板电脑上都安装了 Syncthing。平板电脑需要互联网访问以进行初始安装。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You need to pair Syncthing on your computer with the tablet. Follow these steps:
ast.target: 您需要将计算机上的 Syncthing 与平板电脑配对。请按照以下步骤操作：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在您的计算机上打开 Syncthing (http://127.0.0.1:8384)

ast.name: text
ast.source: Accept the reMarkable device when it appears, or add it manually using the Device ID shown below
ast.target: 当 reMarkable 设备出现时接受它，或使用下方显示的设备 ID 手动添加它

ast.name: text
ast.source: When asked about the shared folder "reMarkable Documents", accept it
ast.target: 当被问及共享文件夹 \"reMarkable Documents\" 时，接受它

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set the folder path to a location inside your vault (e.g., your vault path + /reMarkable)
ast.target: 将文件夹路径设置为保险库内的位置（例如，您的保险库路径 + /reMarkable）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set the folder type to "Send & Receive"
ast.target: 将文件夹类型设置为 \"发送与接收\"

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click "Verify" below to confirm sync is working
ast.target: 点击下方的 \"验证\" 以确认同步正常工作

ast.name: text
ast.source: Do not manually modify files in the Syncthing sync folder. Use the plugin commands to send documents or archive them. Editing files directly can corrupt the tablet's document database.
ast.target: 不要手动修改 Syncthing 同步文件夹中的文件。使用插件命令发送或归档文档。直接编辑文件可能会损坏平板电脑的文档数据库。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 平板电脑 Syncthing 设备 ID：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Review your setup and verify everything works.
ast.target: 检查您的设置并验证一切正常。
